A.text: The electric field lines around plate 2 exhibit a convergent pattern.

B.text: Electric field lines can cross in space.

C.text: Between the two plates, the electric field lines point from plate 2 toward plate 1.

D.text: The electric field lines around plate 1 exhibit a divergent pattern.

parsed.answer_value: The electric field lines around plate 1 exhibit a divergent pattern.
parsed.rationale: Observing the image, the electric field lines originating from Metal Plate 1 spread outwards in all directions, which is the definition of a divergent pattern. Conversely, the lines around Metal Plate 2 converge towards it. Electric field lines never cross each other in space, making option B incorrect. The arrows on the lines between the plates clearly point upwards, from Plate 2 to Plate 1, so option C is also incorrect.
